narrative:
17 Ohio House district has 87,886 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.3% D−R vs -2.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
